given: the user has filled in a title and description on the create form
when: the user clicks the submit button
then: the form submission is successful and the user is redirected to /bugs/{bugId} where {bugId} is the created bug's numeric ID
architectural_notes: Form submission (POST /bugs) requires server-side validation and database persistence; cross-cutting concerns: server-side validation, error handling (API middleware), bug creation in domain/persistence layers. Module: routes/bugs, services/bugService, BugRepository.
